parameters.query:
SELECT 
  session_id,
  location_name,
  property_type,
  list_price_min,
  list_price_max,
  bedrooms_min,
  bedrooms_max,
  bathrooms_min,
  bathrooms_max,
  features
FROM search_context
WHERE session_id = '{{ $json.body.session_id }}'
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  '{{ $json.body.session_id }}' as session_id,
  '' as location_name,
  '' as property_type,
  0 as list_price_min,
  0 as list_price_max,
  0 as bedrooms_min,
  0 as bedrooms_max,
  0 as bathrooms_min,
  0 as bathrooms_max,
  '' as features
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM search_context WHERE session_id = '{{ $json.body.session_id }}'
)
LIMIT 1;

INSERT INTO search_context (
  session_id, location_name, property_type, list_price_min, list_price_max,
  bedrooms_min, bedrooms_max, bathrooms_min, bathrooms_max, features, updated_at
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.session_id }}', '{{ $json.location_name }}', '{{ $json.property_type }}',
  {{ $json.list_price_min || 0 }}, {{ $json.list_price_max || 0 }},
  {{ $json.bedrooms_min || 0 }}, {{ $json.bedrooms_max || 0 }},
  {{ $json.bathrooms_min || 0 }}, {{ $json.bathrooms_max || 0 }},
  '{{ $json.features || "" }}', NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (session_id) DO UPDATE SET
  location_name = CASE WHEN '{{ $json.clear_all_filters }}' = 'true' THEN '' WHEN EXCLUDED.location_name != '' THEN EXCLUDED.location_name ELSE search_context.location_name END,
  property_type = CASE WHEN '{{ $json.clear_all_filters }}' = 'true' THEN '' WHEN EXCLUDED.property_type != '' THEN EXCLUDED.property_type ELSE search_context.property_type END,
  list_price_min = CASE WHEN '{{ $json.clear_all_filters }}' = 'true' THEN 0 WHEN EXCLUDED.list_price_min > 0 THEN EXCLUDED.list_price_min ELSE search_context.list_price_min END,
  list_price_max = CASE WHEN '{{ $json.clear_all_filters }}' = 'true' THEN 0 WHEN EXCLUDED.list_price_max > 0 THEN EXCLUDED.list_price_max ELSE search_context.list_price_max END,
  bedrooms_min = CASE WHEN '{{ $json.clear_all_filters }}' = 'true' THEN 0 WHEN EXCLUDED.bedrooms_min > 0 THEN EXCLUDED.bedrooms_min ELSE search_context.bedrooms_min END,
  bedrooms_max = CASE WHEN '{{ $json.clear_all_filters }}' = 'true' THEN 0 WHEN EXCLUDED.bedrooms_max > 0 THEN EXCLUDED.bedrooms_max ELSE search_context.bedrooms_max END,
  bathrooms_min = CASE WHEN '{{ $json.clear_all_filters }}' = 'true' THEN 0 WHEN EXCLUDED.bathrooms_min > 0 THEN EXCLUDED.bathrooms_min ELSE search_context.bathrooms_min END,
  bathrooms_max = CASE WHEN '{{ $json.clear_all_filters }}' = 'true' THEN 0 WHEN EXCLUDED.bathrooms_max > 0 THEN EXCLUDED.bathrooms_max ELSE search_context.bathrooms_max END,
  features = CASE WHEN '{{ $json.clear_all_filters }}' = 'true' THEN '' WHEN EXCLUDED.features != '' THEN EXCLUDED.features ELSE search_context.features END,
  updated_at = NOW()
RETURNING *;

SELECT 
  variables->>'LOCATION_MAP' as location_map,
  variables->>'TYPE_MAP' as type_map,
  variables->>'FEATURE_MAP' as feature_map,
  variables->>'PROP_API_BASE_URL' as prop_api_base_url,
  variables->>'PROP_AUTH_HEADER' as prop_auth_header
FROM client_variables
WHERE client_id = '{{ $('Merge Request with Context').first().json.CLIENT_ID }}';

parameters.jsCode:
const lookupData = $('Validate & Lookup IDs').first().json;
return { json: { result: lookupData.result } };

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO search_context (
  session_id, location_name, property_type, list_price_min, list_price_max,
  bedrooms_min, bedrooms_max, bathrooms_min, bathrooms_max, features, updated_at
)
SELECT
  '{{ $json.session_id }}', '{{ $json.location_name }}', '{{ $json.property_type }}',
  {{ $json.list_price_min || 0 }}, {{ $json.list_price_max || 0 }},
  {{ $json.bedrooms_min || 0 }}, {{ $json.bedrooms_max || 0 }},
  {{ $json.bathrooms_min || 0 }}, {{ $json.bathrooms_max || 0 }},
  '{{ $json.features || "" }}', NOW()
WHERE '{{ $json.should_save_context }}' = 'true'
ON CONFLICT (session_id) DO UPDATE SET
  location_name = EXCLUDED.location_name,
  property_type = EXCLUDED.property_type,
  list_price_min = EXCLUDED.list_price_min,
  list_price_max = EXCLUDED.list_price_max,
  bedrooms_min = EXCLUDED.bedrooms_min,
  bedrooms_max = EXCLUDED.bedrooms_max,
  bathrooms_min = EXCLUDED.bathrooms_min,
  bathrooms_max = EXCLUDED.bathrooms_max,
  features = EXCLUDED.features,
  updated_at = NOW();
SELECT client_id, api_token, api_base_url FROM clients WHERE is_active = TRUE;
